title: artemisia dracunculus var. glauca
intro: Artemisia dracunculus var. glauca, also known as Russian tarragon or glaucous wormwood, is a subspecies of the tarragon plant native to temperate regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Artemisia dracunculus var. glauca include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
